mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customers (name, phone, email, gender, tags, note, birthday, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{tags}, #{note}, #{birthday}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO customers (name, phone, email, gender, tags, note, birthday, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.gender}, #{item.tags}, #{item.note}, #{item.birthday}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE customers SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, gender = #{gender}, tags = #{tags}, note = #{note}, birthday = #{birthday}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM customers
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
